message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "Integrating application user" as User
participant "Integrating application" as App
participant "<FHIR API> HPI" as HPI
participant "HPI MDM" as HPI_MDM

App -> User: Provide core details to be updated
App -> HPI: POST<Endpoint>/Practitioner/$update-core
HPI -> HPI_MDM: Request
HPI_MDM -> HPI: Validate[]
HPI -> App: Return updated Practitioner record
App -> User: Display updated Provider details to user

@enduml
